morning.title: Elixir v1.20 released: now a gradually typed language
morning.summary: Elixir v1.20 introduces gradual typing, allowing developers to add type annotations to their code.

morning.title: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
morning.summary: Google introduces Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal model that can handle various input formats without requiring encoders.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM acquires Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
morning.summary: Alphabet raises $85B for Google's AI business, indicating significant investment in AI development.

morning.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon
morning.summary: Google introduces Dreambeans, an AI tool that can transform real-life scenes into cartoon-like animations.

gym.title: Beyond Belief
gym.summary: Nir Eyal discusses the concept of belief and its relationship to technology and human behavior.

gym.title: The Power of Real Optimism
gym.summary: Dr. Deepika Chopra talks about the power of real optimism and its impact on mental health and well-being.

gym.title: AI still needs humans
gym.summary: The podcast discusses the ongoing need for human involvement in AI development and deployment.

gym.title: The easiest (& laziest) way to get rich
gym.summary: Nischa shares her perspective on the simplest way to achieve wealth, emphasizing the importance of smart financial decisions.

gym.title: A Conversation with Demis Hassabis, Co-Founder and CEO of Google DeepMind
gym.summary: Demis Hassabis discusses his work at Google DeepMind and the future of AI research and development.

gym.title: AI makes great PMs more powerful
gym.summary: The podcast explores how AI can enhance the capabilities of product managers and improve their decision-making processes.
